title: LA SFR — Type V-B, 4 stories non-sprinklered (exceeds Table 504.4 3-story NS limit)
notes: Tests stories_check: 2021 Table 504.4 R-3/V-B NS row allows 3 stories; 4 fails. (Previously authored as 3 stories against an inverted sprinkler model using the R-2 row.) (4-story SFD is outside the ministerial SFR archetype; gate correctly cannot bucket it.)
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 12 COASTAL WAY
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: R-3
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 4
Building height: 42 ft
Total building area: 3,000 sf
Per-story area: 1,000 sf
Non-sprinklered
Design occupant load: 10
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
Electrical service: 200 A main breaker
WC 3, LAV 3
EXIT 1 (front)
EXIT 2 (rear)
NFPA 72 smoke alarms

ground_truth.rationale: 4 stories exceeds the 3-story NS limit for R-3/V-B (Table 504.4)
Plans explicitly state non-sprinklered; required for this configuration
